issue_title: Add sub-workflow to the iterative workflow cannot connect the agents
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 在迭代工作流中添加子工作流节点，然后尝试将子工作流中的 Agent 节点与其他节点进行连线操作，观察连线是否能正常建立。
expected_result_zh: 在迭代工作流中添加子工作流后，子工作流内的 Agent 节点能够正常与其他节点进行连线，连接线成功建立且工作流拓扑关系正确。
